description: An investor client is considering buying a multi-tenant retail property and needs a financial analysis.

nodes.task_description: Gather property financials: purchase price, gross income from rent roll, and operating expenses (taxes, insurance, maintenance).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary financial data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the Net Operating Income (NOI) and the Capitalization Rate (Cap Rate).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates NOI and Cap Rate.

nodes.task_description: Create a pro-forma report summarizing the analysis and key investment metrics for the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a clear and accurate investment analysis report.
